My Education

I have done...

HIGH SCHOOL (2014)

Shiv Charan Inter College

I have done my high school in 2014 from shiv charan inter college affiliated with up board. I have scored 80% in high school.

INTERMEDIATE (2016)

Jp Janta Inter College

I have done my inter in 2016 from jp janta inter college affiliated with up board. I have scored 63% in inter.

GRADUATION (2019)

IMS Ghaziabad University Courses Campus

I have done my graduation in BCA from IMS ghaziabad affiliated with ccsu. I have scored 63% in graduation.
